injuries.comment: The Ducks said on Saturday (Nov. 22) that Poehling will be out for at least another week, per Zach Cavanagh of The Sporting Tribune.
The Ducks listed Dostal as OUT for Wednesday's (Nov. 26) game versus the Canucks.
The Canucks said on Tuesday (Nov. 25) that Lankinen is stepping away from the team due to personal reasons.
